gamePlan.title: Game Plan
gamePlan.missingPdf: The game plan for this language is not available yet.

card.insertSubtitle: Place your player card on the reader to continue
card.notFound: Card not found. Please try again.

dob.title: Identity verification
dob.subtitle: Enter your date of birth
dob.wrong: Date of birth doesn't match. Attempts: {{tries}}/3
dob.tooManyTries: Too many attempts. Returning to home screen.

panic.title: Self-Exclusion
panic.exclude48Desc: You will not be allowed to play for 48 hours.
panic.excludePermDesc: Permanent exclusion from all our casinos.
panic.confirmText: This action cannot be undone. Are you sure?
panic.success: Your request has been submitted successfully.
panic.howTo:
1. Insert your card into the reader.
2. Enter your date of birth to verify.
3. Choose 48-hour or permanent exclusion.
4. Confirm. Our staff will contact you if needed.

playerInfo.title: Player Info
playerInfo.name: Name
playerInfo.howTo:
1. Insert your card into the reader.
2. Enter your date of birth to verify.
3. View your personal details and card balance.
